content.text:
Now I have a clear view of the molecule and can identify the neighbors of atom N:7. From the image, I can see that nitrogen atom 7 is bonded to three carbon atoms:

1. C:6 (carbon atom with index 6)
2. C:8 (carbon atom with index 8)
3. C:43 (carbon atom with index 43)

Let me verify this by examining the connections more carefully. Looking at the structure, atom N:7 is part of a ring system and is connected to these three carbon atoms via covalent bonds.

The geomconf_index for this molecule can be determined from the filename "geomconf_5513.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 5513.

So the neighbor atoms of atom N:7 are:
- Atom index 6, element C
- Atom index 8, element C  
- Atom index 43, element C

Geomconf_index: 5513

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 7, whose element should be N. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
